title: Production Evals For Agentic AI Systems - Nishant Gupta, Meta Superintelligence Labs
summary: Nishant Gupta from Meta discusses production evaluation approaches for autonomous AI agents that go beyond offline benchmarks. The talk covers continuous evaluation pipelines, online vs offline evaluation architectures, human-in-the-loop systems, and methods for detecting drift and hallucinations in agentic workflows at scale.
writeup: Nishant Gupta of Meta Superintelligence Labs walks through how to evaluate autonomous AI agents in production rather than relying solely on offline benchmarks. The talk contrasts online and offline evaluation architectures, lays out continuous evaluation pipelines, and explains where human-in-the-loop review fits, with attention to detecting drift and hallucinations across agentic workflows at scale. Production matters here because static benchmarks miss failures that surface once agents handle tool use and structured workflows in live settings. Observability and capped evaluation are presented as practical levers for keeping that monitoring tractable.
